lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Greetings adventurer, I am the Melee combat tutor. Is there anything I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about melee combat.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Well adventurer, the first thing you will need is a sword and a shield appropriate for your level.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Make sure to equip your sword and shield. Click on them in your inventory, they will disappear from your inventory and move to your worn items. You can see your worn items in the worn items tab here.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: When you are wielding your sword you will then be able to see the correct options in the combat interface.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: There are four different melee styles. Accurate, aggressive, defensive and controlled. Not all weapons will have all four styles though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting, what does each style do?

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Well I am glad you asked. The accurate style will give you experience points in your Attack skill, you will also find you will deal damage more frequently as a result of being, well, more accurate.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Next we have the aggressive style. This style will give you experience points in your Strength skill. When using this style you will notice that your attacks will hit a little harder.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Now for the defensive style, this style will give you experience points in your Defensive skill. When using this style you will notice that you get hit less often.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Finally, we have the controlled style. This style will give you the same amount of experience as the other styles would but shared across all three of the combat skills.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: If you were using the training sword for example, there are four different attack types. Stab, lunge, slash and block.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Each type uses one of the attack styles. Stab uses accurate, lunge and slash use aggressive and block uses defensive.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: To find out which style an attack type uses, hover your mouse cursor over the style button.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: If you need some more advice, you should talk to Adventurer Jon about Adventure paths. He may even have a handy starter kit you can use.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What if I wanted to fight something a bit more... human.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Well adventurer, there are a few places you might be able to do this.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: You could try your luck at castle wars. Here, two teams fight each other to defend their respective flags. To win the game you will need to get the other team's flag and return it to your flag stand.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Capture the flag, sounds like a lot of fun.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: If you are in a clan, you should gather some clan members and try out clan wars. There you can see which clan is better than the other by fighting each other in an arena.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Both activities are safe minigame, which means if you die you will not loose any of your items. You can get to them by using the teleport option in your minigames tab.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: There is also the wilderness. The wilderness is north of Varrock and you can fight other players there. But bare in mind if you die to another player in the wilderness you will lose your stuff.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: But this also means that if you kill another player you will be able to take their stuff too.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Only go into the wilderness with items you are willing to lose and pay attention to the wilderness level you are in. The higher the level you go, more player will be able to attack you.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: You can find which player can attack you by checking your combat level.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Minus the wilderness level from your combat level to find the lowest level that you can attack, then add the wilderness level to your combat level to find the highest level that you can attack.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about different weapon types I can use

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Well let me see now...There are stabbing type weapons such as daggers, then you have swords which are slashing, maces that have great crushing abilities, battle axes which are powerful.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: It depends a lot on how you want to fight. Experiment and find out what is best for you. Never be scared to try out a new weapon; you never know, you might like it!

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: While I tried all of them for a while, I settled on this rather good sword.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: You might also find that different weapon types are more accurate against different monsters.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about skillcapes.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Of course. Skillcapes are a symbol of achievement. Only people who have mastered a skill and reached level 99 can get their hands on them and gain the benefits they carry.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: The Cape of Defence will act as ring of life, saving you from combat if your hitpoints become low.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like a training sword and shield.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: You already have a training sword and shield. Save some for the other adventurers.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: There you go, use it well.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: There you go, use it well.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: There you go, use it well.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Ah, but I can see you're already a master in the fine art of Defence. Perhaps you have come to me to purchase a Skillcape of Defence, and thus join the elite few who have mastered this exacting skill?

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: In recognition of your defensive abilities, when you have it equipped it will act as ring of life, saving you from combat if your hitpoints become low.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I buy a Skillcape of Defence, please?

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: You wish to join the elite defenders of this world? I'm afraid such things do not come cheaply - in fact they cost 99000 coins, to be precise!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 99000 coins? That's much too expensive.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Not at all; there are many other adventurers who would love the opportunity to purchase such a prestigious item! You can find me here if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I have the money right here, actually.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But, unfortunately, I was mistaken.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Well, come back and see me when you do.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Excellent! Wear that cape with pride my friend.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Greetings adventurer, I am the Melee combat tutor. Is there anything I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have a starter pack?

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Here you go. One starter pack. Enjoy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you stop me receiving a starter pack after respawn?

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Yes, I can help with that.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: You'll no longer receive a starter pack after respawn. Talk to me again if you change your mind.

sections.title: Using items on Melee combat tutor

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I no longer need my Training shield, would you like it back?

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Sure thing, I can give this to another adventurer who is in need of training.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I no longer need my Training sword, would you like it back?

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: Sure thing, I can give this to another adventurer who is in need of training.

lines.speaker: Melee combat tutor
lines.text: I have no use for that, sorry.
